languages.text: "Мы служили вашему святейшему предку несколько веков назад, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Мы чтим его за его деяния, но никто уже не знает каков был его нрав".

traits.locale_text: "Мы служили вашему святейшему предку несколько веков назад, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Мы чтим его за его деяния, но никто уже не знает каков был его нрав".
traits.speaker: IzhdrigBatoshskiColonel

languages.text: "We served your hallowed ancestor several centuries ago, {mf|lord|lady} heir. We honour him for his deeds, but no one living knows him as a person."
languages.original_text: "Мы служили вашему святейшему предку несколько веков назад, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Мы чтим его за его деяния, но никто уже не знает каков был его нрав".

traits.locale_text: "We served your hallowed ancestor several centuries ago, {mf|lord|lady} heir. We honour him for his deeds, but no one living knows him as a person."
"We served your hallowed ancestor several centuries ago, {mf|lord|lady} heir. We honour him for his deeds, but no one living knows him as a person."
"We served your hallowed ancestor several centuries ago, {mf|lord|lady} heir. We honour him for his deeds, but no one living knows him as a person."
"We served your hallowed ancestor several centuries ago, {mf|lord|lady} heir. We honour him for his deeds, but no one living knows him as a person."
"We served your hallowed ancestor several centuries ago, {mf|lord|lady} heir. We honour him for his deeds, but no one living knows him as a person."

languages.text: "Wir haben Eurem verehrten Ahnherrn vor mehreren Jahrhunderten gedient, {mf|Lord Erbe|Lady Erbin}. Wir ehren ihn für seine Taten, aber kein Lebender kannte ihn persönlich."
languages.original_text: "We served your hallowed ancestor several centuries ago, {mf|lord|lady} heir. We honour him for his deeds, but no one living knows him as a person."

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben Eurem verehrten Ahnherrn vor mehreren Jahrhunderten gedient, {mf|Lord Erbe|Lady Erbin}. Wir ehren ihn für seine Taten, aber kein Lebender kannte ihn persönlich."

languages.text: « Nous avons servi votre auguste ancêtre il y a des siècles, {mf|héritier|héritière}, et si nous rendons toujours hommage à ses hauts faits, aucun de nous ne l'a connu de son vivant. »
languages.original_text: "We served your hallowed ancestor several centuries ago, {mf|lord|lady} heir. We honour him for his deeds, but no one living knows him as a person."

traits.locale_text: Nous avons servi votre auguste ancêtre il y a des siècles, {mf|héritier|héritière}, et si nous rendons toujours hommage à ses hauts faits, aucun de nous ne l'a connu de son vivant. »

languages.text: «Servimos a su santo antepasado hace siglos, mi{mf|lord|lady} hereder{mf|o|a}. Honramos sus hazañas, pero no hay nadie que llegara a conocerlo sigue vivo».
languages.original_text: "We served your hallowed ancestor several centuries ago, {mf|lord|lady} heir. We honour him for his deeds, but no one living knows him as a person."

traits.locale_text: «Servimos a su santo antepasado hace siglos, mi{mf|lord|lady} hereder{mf|o|a}. Honramos sus hazañas, pero no hay nadie que llegara a conocerlo sigue vivo».

languages.text: "Kutsal atanıza birkaç yüzyıl önce hizmet ettik {mf|lord|leydi} vâris. İcraatları için onu onurlandırsak da hayatta olan kimse kendisini şahsen tanımıyor."
languages.original_text: "We served your hallowed ancestor several centuries ago, {mf|lord|lady} heir. We honour him for his deeds, but no one living knows him as a person."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal atanıza birkaç yüzyıl önce hizmet ettik {mf|lord|leydi} vâris. İcraatları için onu onurlandırsak da hayatta olan kimse kendisini şahsen tanımıyor."

languages.text: “我们在数个世纪前侍奉过您那至圣的祖先，继承人大人。我们因他的功绩而敬仰他，可在世之人中，已无人真正了解他这个人。”
languages.original_text: "We served your hallowed ancestor several centuries ago, {mf|lord|lady} heir. We honour him for his deeds, but no one living knows him as a person."

traits.locale_text: “我们在数个世纪前侍奉过您那至圣的祖先，继承人大人。我们因他的功绩而敬仰他，可在世之人中，已无人真正了解他这个人。”

languages.text: 「我々は数世紀前に貴方の祖先様を奉仕しました、{mf|殿|女}御。我々は彼の功績を称賛しますが、生者で彼を知っている者は一人もいません。」
languages.original_text: "We served your hallowed ancestor several centuries ago, {mf|lord|lady} heir. We honour him for his deeds, but no one living knows him as a person."

traits.locale_text: 「我々は数世紀前に貴方の祖先様を奉仕しました、{mf|殿|女}御。我々は彼の功績を称賛しますが、生者で彼を知っている者は一人もいません。」
